summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend smoke test for Solvit People Management Platform. 46/46 backend pytest cases passed across 22 routers (health, auth, employees, solvers, recruitment, onboarding, performance, surveys, retention, lnd, compensation, recognition, budget, policies, disciplinary, leave, calendar, compliance, settings, ai_agent, forms, automation). All 19 frontend module pages render without console errors. AI Agent (Emergent LLM gpt-5.2) end-to-end works (returned a real NSSF answer). Quick demo login tiles work for HR Admin. Role-based sidebar filtering verified for Employee role.

issues: Two 401 console errors fired on /login from /api/auth/me probe before login. Cosmetic — should suppress 401 logging on the unauthenticated landing page.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Suppress the 401 console error from the initial /api/auth/me check on the public /login route — silently catch and treat as unauthenticated.
critical_code_review_comments: Per other_misc_info note: routes mix {_id: ObjectId(id)} and {id: id} lookup patterns and fmt() helpers overwrite UUID 'id' with str(_id). This is fragile — recommend standardising on the UUID 'id' field everywhere and stripping '_id' uniformly. No bugs surfaced in tests but it will bite on UPDATE/DELETE flows.
Stephen Kiragu seed (status='Exited') appears in /api/employees list — confirm this is intentional vs filtering exited employees out of default list endpoint.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' in backend/.env combined with credentials=true cookies will be rejected by browsers in production. Replace with explicit origin (FRONTEND_URL) when allow_credentials=True.
JWT_SECRET is committed to .env (low risk in preview but should rotate before any production handoff).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (19/19 module pages load + AI panel + RBAC verified)

test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md — all 6 demo accounts authenticated successfully with Solvit@2026.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Verified existing seed: 10+ employees, 3+ solvers, 5+ pay bands, 60+ automation rules, 32 forms.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_solvit_platform.py is the regression baseline (46 tests, all passing). Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_solvit_platform.py -v. Frontend uses data-testid='demo-login-{role}' on login tiles and data-testid='ai-chat-input' / 'ai-chat-send' on AI panel. KPI labels are uppercase via CSS text-transform (DOM stores them mixed-case 'Total FTE', 'Active', etc.) — when asserting in HTML body string use case-insensitive match.
verified_flows: Login for all 6 demo users + bad password 401 + /me + logout
All 22 backend routers GET endpoints return 200
PAYE calculator returns paye/nssf/sha/net fields for KES 75000
32 forms listed; form-01 schema fetched; form-03 submit endpoint reachable
AI chat (HR Admin 200 with conversation_id and real Emergent LLM response; Employee 403)
Settings keys masked in GET response
Budget summary forbidden for Employee role
Dashboard Kanban (4 columns: Onboarding/Active/Exiting/Exited) + 6 KPI strip + LIST toggle
All 19 module pages load with zero console errors as HR Admin
Employee role sidebar correctly hides Settings, Disciplinary, Recruitment, Budget, Solvers, Compensation, Compliance, Retention, AI HR Agent button
